extra.reason: Configured global Git identity for Beads auto-commit and verified Beads commands work.
Fixed pre-commit review blockers: delete confirmation/trash behavior, explicit archive/delete prompts, safer board trashing, YAML quoting, scoped gitignore, installer trust validation; tests passed.
GitHub CLI auth made available to Hermes PM profile; direct origin push denied by repository permissions, so branch was pushed to brumsey/hermes-agent fork.
Pushed branch to brumsey fork and opened upstream PR #32166 against NousResearch/hermes-agent main.
